CVE-2010-2023.title: transports/appendfile.c in Exim before 4.72, when a world-writabl ...
CVE-2010-2023.description: transports/appendfile.c in Exim before 4.72, when a world-writable sticky-bit mail directory is used, does not verify the st_nlink field of mailbox files, which allows local users to cause a denial of service or possibly gain privileges by creating a hard link to another user's file.

CVE-2010-2024.title: transports/appendfile.c in Exim before 4.72, when MBX locking is  ...
CVE-2010-2024.description: transports/appendfile.c in Exim before 4.72, when MBX locking is enabled, allows local users to change permissions of arbitrary files or create arbitrary files, and cause a denial of service or possibly gain privileges, via a symlink attack on a lockfile in /tmp/.

CVE-2011-0017.title: The open_log function in log.c in Exim 4.72 and earlier does not  ...
CVE-2011-0017.description: The open_log function in log.c in Exim 4.72 and earlier does not check the return value from (1) setuid or (2) setgid system calls, which allows local users to append log data to arbitrary files via a symlink attack.

CVE-2014-2972.title: expand.c in Exim before 4.83 expands mathematical comparisons twi ...
CVE-2014-2972.description: expand.c in Exim before 4.83 expands mathematical comparisons twice, which allows local users to gain privileges and execute arbitrary commands via a crafted lookup value.

CVE-2016-1531.title: Exim before 4.86.2, when installed setuid root, allows local user ...
CVE-2016-1531.description: Exim before 4.86.2, when installed setuid root, allows local users to gain privileges via the perl_startup argument.

CVE-2017-1000369.title: Exim supports the use of multiple "-p" command line arguments whi ...
CVE-2017-1000369.description: Exim supports the use of multiple "-p" command line arguments which are malloc()'ed and never free()'ed, used in conjunction with other issues allows attackers to cause arbitrary code execution. This affects exim version 4.89 and earlier. Please note that at this time upstream has released a patch (commit 65e061b76867a9ea7aeeb535341b790b90ae6c21), but it is not known if a new point release is available that addresses this issue at this time.

CVE-2018-6789.title: An issue was discovered in the base64d function in the SMTP liste ...
CVE-2018-6789.description: An issue was discovered in the base64d function in the SMTP listener in Exim before 4.90.1. By sending a handcrafted message, a buffer overflow may happen. This can be used to execute code remotely.

CVE-2019-15846.title: Exim before 4.92.2 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary c ...
CVE-2019-15846.description: Exim before 4.92.2 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code as root via a trailing backslash.

CVE-2020-12783.title: Exim through 4.93 has an out-of-bounds read in the SPA authentica ...
CVE-2020-12783.description: Exim through 4.93 has an out-of-bounds read in the SPA authenticator that could result in SPA/NTLM authentication bypass in auths/spa.c and auths/auth-spa.c.

CVE-2020-8015.title: A UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following vulnerability in the pac ...
CVE-2020-8015.description: A UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following vulnerability in the packaging of exim in openSUSE Factory allows local attackers to escalate from user mail to root. This issue affects: openSUSE Factory exim versions prior to 4.93.0.4-3.1.
